info.description: SMS A2P RESTful documentation based on Swagger 2.0 specification
info.title: SMS A2P

post.summary: Send a SMS message to one mobile terminal
post.description: The POST /smsmessaging/v1/outbound/{senderAddress}/requests URI sends a SMS message to one mobile terminal. This operation is based on GSMA OneAPI SMS RESTful NetAPI

parameters.name: senderAddress
parameters.description: The MSISDN of the sender, including the 'tel:' protocol identifier and the country code prefixed by '+', must be URL-escaped.

400.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC0001: A service error occurred
- SVC0002: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0003: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0004: No valid addresses provided for message part
- SVC0280: Message too long

403.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0001: A policy error occurred
- POL0003: Too many addresses specified in message part
- POL0007: Nested groups specified in message part not allowed

404.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0010: Requested information unavailable as the retention time interval has expired

406.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0011: Media type not supported

503.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC1000: No resources This exception is thrown if there are no server resources available to process the request

post.summary: Subscribe to SMS delivery receipt (DR) notification
post.description: The POST /smsmessaging/v1/outbound/{senderAddress}/subscriptions URI allows the consumer to subscribe to SMS delivery receipt (DR) notification. This operation is based on GSMA OneAPI SMS RESTful NetAPI

parameters.name: senderAddress
parameters.description: The MSISDN of the sender, including the 'tel:' protocol identifier and the country code prefixed by '+', must be URL-escaped.

400.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC0001: A service error occurred
- SVC0002: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0003: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0004: No valid addresses provided for message part
- SVC0280: Message too long

403.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0001: A policy error occurred
- POL0003: Too many addresses specified in message part
- POL0007: Nested groups specified in message part not allowed

404.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0010: Requested information unavailable as the retention time interval has expired

406.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0011: Media type not supported

503.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC1000: No resources This exception is thrown if there are no server resources available to process the request

get.summary: Retrieve information about a SMS Delivery Receipt (DR) notification subscription
get.description: The GET /smsmessaging/v1/outbound/{senderAddress}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId} URI retrieves information related to Delivery Receipt (DR) notification subscription according to a given subscription identifier

parameters.name: senderAddress
parameters.description: The MSISDN of the sender, including the 'tel:' protocol identifier and the country code prefixed by '+', must be URL-escaped.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the DR notifications susbscription to retrieve

400.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC0001: A service error occurred
- SVC0002: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0003: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0004: No valid addresses provided for message part
- SVC0280: Message too long

403.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0001: A policy error occurred
- POL0003: Too many addresses specified in message part
- POL0007: Nested groups specified in message part not allowed

404.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0010: Requested information unavailable as the retention time interval has expired

406.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0011: Media type not supported

503.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC1000: No resources This exception is thrown if there are no server resources available to process the request

delete.summary: Delete a SMS Delivery Receipt (DR) notification subscription
delete.description: The GET /smsmessaging/v1/outbound/{senderAddress}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}  URI deletes information related to Delivery Receipt (DR) notification subscription according to a given subscription identifier

parameters.name: senderAddress
parameters.description: The MSISDN of the sender, including the 'tel:' protocol identifier and the country code prefixed by '+', must be URL-escaped.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the DR notifications susbscription to delete

400.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC0001: A service error occurred
- SVC0002: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0003: Invalid input value for message part
- SVC0004: No valid addresses provided for message part
- SVC0280: Message too long

403.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0001: A policy error occurred
- POL0003: Too many addresses specified in message part
- POL0007: Nested groups specified in message part not allowed

404.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0010: Requested information unavailable as the retention time interval has expired

406.description:
List of error codes:
- POL0011: Media type not supported

503.description:
List of error codes:
- SVC1000: No resources This exception is thrown if there are no server resources available to process the request

get.description: The GET /sms/admin/v1/contracts URI lists the contracts of the partner. It allows filtering by country.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha 3  country code (e.g. CIV, see https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1)

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language of the labels. Default value is EN. Note that in V1.0, only the default language will be supported.

400.description:
List of error codes:
- 232740000: Missing input
- 232740001: Malformed request body
- 232740002: Malformed URI
- 232740003: Invalid input value

500.description:
List of error codes:
- 232740004: Internal error

get.description: The GET /sms/admin/v1/purchaseorders URI lists the purchase history of a partner. It allows filtering by country.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha 3  country code (e.g. CIV, see https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1)

400.description:
List of error codes:
- 232740000: Missing input
- 232740001: Malformed request body
- 232740002: Malformed URI
- 232740003: Invalid input value

500.description:
List of error codes:
- 232740004: Internal error

get.summary: List the usage statistics per contract
get.description: The GET /sms/admin/v1/statistics lists the usage statistics of a partner. It allows filtering by country.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166 alpha 3  country code  (e.g. CIV, see https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1)

400.description:
List of error codes:
- 232740000: Missing input
- 232740001: Malformed request body
- 232740002: Malformed URI
- 232740003: Invalid input value

500.description:
List of error codes:
- 232740004: Internal error

policyException.description: means that the request syntax is valid, however an operator policy has been broken

serviceException.description: describes the reason why the service cannot accept the request

text.description: text which describes the consistently of the exception

variables.description: relates to the %1 placeholder(s) in the text property

address.description: End user ID; in this case the MSISDN including the 'tel:' protocol identifier and the country code prefixed by '+'. (i.e. tel:+16309700001)

senderAddress.description: The MSISDN of the sender, including the 'tel:' protocol identifier and the country code prefixed by '+'. Must be the same as the senderAddress in the URI.

senderName.description: URL-escaped name of the sender to appear on the terminal is the address to whom a responding SMS may be sent.

notifyURL.description: URL which will be used by the API to POST the notifications to the partner Back-End

bundleDescription.description: Full description of the purchased bundle

partnerId.description: Partner identifier provided by Orange Partner

inputs.description: JSON structure containing all the necessary inputs to perform the purchase (depends on the method used).

service.description: Technical name of the subscribed service (e.g. SMS_OCB)

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha 3  country code (e.g. CIV, see https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1)

partnerId.description: Partner Identifier provided by Orange Partner

contracts.description: List of contracts associated to the partner

service.description: Technical name of the subscribed service (e.g. SMS_OCB)

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha 3  country code (e.g. CIV, see https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1)

service.description: Technical name of the subscribed service (e.g. SMS_OCB)

scDescription.description: Country-specific contract description, contains the number of units to consume and the expiration date

partnerId.description: Partner Identifier provided by Orange Partner

statistics.description: List of usage statistics associated to the partner

service.description: Technical name of the subscribed service (e.g. SMS_OCB)

serviceStatistics.description: List of statistics associated to the service

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha 3  country code (e.g. CIV, see https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1)

countryStatistics.description: List of statistics associated to the country

appid.description: Application identifier of the partner provided by Orange Partner

usage.description: Number of units consumed by the application
